description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior features a combination of dark and light wall panels, with large windows on several sides allowing for ample natural light. The structure is surrounded by a patterned yard, with green and beige sections suggesting landscaped grass and paved areas. The front facade includes a prominent entryway and a garage door, while the rear and side elevations display additional glass doors and windows. The roofline is clean and unembellished, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall design is functional and open, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels, surrounded by landscaped yard areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the main entryway, garage door, and a mix of green and beige yard patterns.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the long side of the bungalow, featuring extensive windows and a clear view of the garage and side yard.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the bungalow, with additional glass doors and windows, and a continuation of the landscaped yard.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite long side, showing more windows and the transition between paved and grassy yard areas.
